case_title: GRAYHAWK COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION, AN ARIZONA VS. MIKHAIL TSOTSIASHVILI et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAYHAWK COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION, AN ARIZONA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TSOTSIASHVILI, MIKHAIL BOYKO, VICTORIA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRAYHAWK COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION, AN ARIZONA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSOTSIASHVILI, MIKHAIL BOYKO, VICTORIA $5,577.48 PRINCIPAL, $139.06 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,941.54, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAYHAWK COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION, AN ARIZONA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION SERVED JAN-10-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOYKO, VICTORIA PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON FEB-21-2012 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAYHAWK COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION, AN ARIZONA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION SERVED JAN-10-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TSOTSIASHVILI, MIKHAIL PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON FEB-21-2012 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,338.07 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAYHAWK COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION, AN ARIZONA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TSOTSIASHVILI, MIKHAIL BOYKO, VICTORIA
